front.title: Proof of Sovereign Integrity (PSI): Protocol Specification v1

author.organization: Apex Intelligence Empire / ROCKYFILMS888 PTY LTD

abstract.t: This document specifies the Proof of Sovereign Integrity (PSI) Protocol for verifiable AI regulatory compliance. Revision 01 updates the March 2026 specification with EU AI Act Article 50 alignment and post-quantum cryptographic requirements.
